title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!
